description: CompositionIndigo blue, black and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, that has 3/4th sleeves with buttoned cuffs and button detailing at mid-sleeve level, asymmetric panels on the sides, full buttoned placket and contrast denim panel on the inseam of the collar, yellow stitch detailing, denim godets on the side hems and curved hemline  FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyHand wash or machine wash in cold waterUse mild detergentTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm iron Get back to the basics with this indigo blue and white check shirt from scullers. The contoured seams and 3/4th sleeves makes this shirt a great choice for everyday wear. Team this with denims, brown leather boots and chunky silver jewellery for a really cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
